title: Vanilla Advancement Precisions
description: This data pack stores all the information about your progress!
body:
This DataPack remember for you all informations about your advancement progression !
It will show you every single Minecraft Vanilla progression at all times.

Which mobs rest out of the 36 I have already killed for "monsters hunted" advancement ?
![A detailed advancement tab for every monster you kill and those you haven't, divided into 5 different sub-categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/edy0jygV/images/db4b9cc91d898c99e80513aa5aca18437a876576.png)


What foods have I already eaten for "a balanced diet" advancement ?
![A detailed advancement tab for every food you have eaten and those you haven't, divided into 5 sub-categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/edy0jygV/images/09ab5102c4d0c2b679b836000676e82f3fbd6945.png)


Which biomes i have already discovered for "adventuring time" advancement ?
![A detailed advancement tab for each biome you visit and those you haven't, divided into 6 sub-categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/edy0jygV/images/73e30ed509ad3b70962f3a0f7e70261ff3c82319.png)


And so much more like; which cats i have adopt for "a complete catalogue" advancement ?
![A detailed advancement tab for each cat you have tamed and those you haven't](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/edy0jygV/images/1251cc63dc032392f82a8273597b80a3e1c9d362.png)
